profile: MSc Computer Science student at the University of Lincoln with 3+ years of frontend development experience in ReactJS and enterprise platforms. Built and maintained a banking platform used by external partner banks. Skilled in React, Vue, Angular, advanced state management, micro-frontend architecture, testing, and internationalisation.

responsibilities: Reduced average feature implementation time by ~25% by integrating AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot) into the team workflow for spec parsing, code generation, and debugging.
Increased test coverage by 30% using Jest and Vitest, reducing production regressions by 15% across core modules.
Collaborated cross-functionally with backend engineers and BA teams to design scalable API flows, improving data consistency and reducing integration issues.
Developed cross-platform features using React Native, improving mobile user experience and code reuse.
Implemented internationalisation using React-i18next, enabling multi-language support and expanding product accessibility.
Developed and contributed to a micro-frontend architecture, enabling modular development, independent deployments, and faster feature delivery.
Developed and maintained a web-based banking platform used by external partner banks.
Built responsive and reusable React components for dashboards, forms, and data visualisation.
Integrated frontend applications with RESTful APIs to display real-time financial data.
Focused on performance, usability, and cross-browser compatibility in a production environment.
